## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (build + tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for any policy, config, adapter, prompt-envelope, or installer change
- [ ] Docs updated in the same change (README / `docs/` / examples) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets in code, config, examples, or tests
- [ ] The bridge stays generic (no project-specific presets in the default package)
